name: 12q24_33_subtelomeric_SD
description: 12q24.33 distal subtelomeric segmental duplication cluster covering the last ~2 Mb of 12q. Contains subtelomeric SD modules shared with other chromosome ends (4q35, 8p23, 10q26, 17p13) and predisposes to 12q-terminal microdeletions / FISH cryptic translocations.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of 5-50 kb at 90-97% identity shared with multiple subtelomeres; interspersed olfactory-receptor sub-cluster; cryptic translocation substrate.
